member.name: T:OfficeIMO.Shared.ObjectDataHelpers
member.summary: Shared helpers for projecting object data into tabular structures.

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.Shared.ObjectDataHelpers.GetColumnNames(System.Object)
member.summary: Resolves column names from a dictionary or public readable properties.

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.Shared.ObjectDataHelpers.IsDictionaryLike(System.Object)
member.summary: Returns whether the item exposes dictionary keys rather than fixed CLR properties.

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.Shared.ObjectDataHelpers.GetValue(System.Object,System.String)
member.summary: Retrieves a value for the specified column from a dictionary or property.

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.Shared.ObjectDataHelpers.TryCreatePropertyProjector(System.Object,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.String},System.Func{System.Object,System.Object[],System.Boolean}@)
member.summary: Creates a reusable projector for a fixed CLR object type and column order.

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.Shared.ObjectDataHelpers.TryCreatePropertyTextProjector(System.Object,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.String},System.Func{System.Object,System.String[],System.Globalization.CultureInfo,System.Boolean}@)
member.summary: Creates a reusable text projector for a fixed CLR object type and column order.

member.name: T:OfficeIMO.Shared.OfficeFileConversion
member.summary: Validates file-to-file Office conversions without applying format-specific policy.

member.name: T:OfficeIMO.Shared.NonDisposingMemoryStream
member.summary: MemoryStream that suppresses disposal so OpenXml packages can close without losing the buffer.
